title: Onboarding — DaMIfLL Scientific Working Group
description: Onboarding documentation for members of the DaMIfLL Scientific Working Group (SWG) at the Leibniz Centre for Agricultural Landscape Research (ZALF). Covers project and knowledge management workflows using GitHub and Quarto, document sharing conventions, communication channels, and workspace setup for VS Code / Positron. Available in English and German.

creators.name: DaMIfLL Scientific Working Group
creators.affiliation: Leibniz Centre for Agricultural Landscape Research (ZALF)

_note_community: TODO: Replace YOUR_ZENODO_COMMUNITY_SLUG with your community identifier. Find it in the URL of your community page at https://zenodo.org/communities/ — it is the short slug after the last slash, e.g. 'zalf-damifll'.
_note_version: TODO: Update 'version' for each release before triggering the workflow. Follows semantic versioning (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH).
notes: Files: onboarding_en.pdf (English), onboarding_de.pdf (German). Rendered from Quarto source documents.
